mapper.select: SELECT order_id, customer_id, address_id, status, order_date, total_amount FROM Orders
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Orders ( customer_id, address_id, status, order_date, total_amount ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{addressId}, #{status}, #{orderDate}, #{totalAmount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE Orders SET customer_id = #{customerId}, address_id = #{addressId}, status = #{status}, order_date = #{orderDate}, total_amount = #{totalAmount} WHERE order_id = #{id}
